note: DESIGN-SIDE ONLY scaffold produced by the design-reading step. Selectors were validated against the live DESIGN render at http://127.0.0.1:8112/design-kit/app-v3/index.html?dest=projects&state=<state> (detail needs --delay 1500 because the harness reaches it by clicking .grid3 .proj-card:nth-child(1)). The `live` field is intentionally absent — the next step fills it in and renames this to anchors.json.

elements.label: card.name
elements.what: project title inside the card; UNCLASSED div carrying inline font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:600;font-size:14px (copilot-app.jsx:178)

elements.label: card.icon
elements.what: 32x32 r8 initial tile. Inline background:p.color is DEAD — copilot.css:302 sets background:var(--panel3)!important, so computed bg is rgb(29,29,35) for every project

elements.label: card
elements.what: <button class="card proj-card">; padding var(--pad)=13px, border 1px var(--line), radius var(--r)=8px, bg var(--panel); hover -> line2 border + panel2 bg

elements.label: card.desc
elements.what: description line; .lrow__sub 11px/var(--mut2) but inline-overridden to font-family:var(--body) + margin-top:10px (copilot-app.jsx:180)

elements.label: card.meta
elements.what: '3 chats · 12 files' counts line; keeps .lrow__sub MONO family, inline margin-top:10px only (copilot-app.jsx:181)

elements.label: grid
elements.what: 3-up card grid, repeat(3,1fr) gap 10px (copilot.css:298); collapses to 1fr under 900px (copilot.css:299)

elements.label: page.lead
elements.what: 12px var(--mut) lead paragraph, margin -2px 0 18px, max-width 72ch, line-height 1.6 (copilot.css:281)

elements.label: page.container
elements.what: surface page frame: padding 20px 24px 40px, max-width 960px (copilot.css:280) + inline flex:1;min-height:0;overflow:auto

elements.label: detail.title
elements.what: project name; h2 base is var(--disp)/600/letter-spacing -.01em, inline font-size:18px (copilot-app.jsx:154)

elements.label: detail.icon
elements.what: same 32px initial tile as the card; inline p.color again suppressed by the !important in copilot.css:302

elements.label: detail.desc
elements.what: project description under the title, inline font-family:var(--body) override of the mono .lrow__sub

elements.label: detail.backlink
elements.what: '< All projects' back button: mono 11px var(--mut), no border/padding, margin-bottom 14px, 13px svg (copilot.css:305-307)

elements.label: detail.secth
elements.what: 'Chats · 3' section head: .sect-h mono 9.5px, letter-spacing .12em (=1.14px), uppercase, var(--mut2), margin 22px 0 10px (copilot.css:282)

elements.label: detail.rowlist.chats
elements.what: .rowlist card: column flex, 1px var(--line) border, r8, overflow hidden, bg var(--panel) (copilot.css:284)

elements.label: detail.chatrow
elements.what: <button class="lrow"> 11px/14px padding, 12px gap, bottom hairline, hover panel2; navigates to Run (copilot-app.jsx:115)

elements.label: detail.chatrow.icon
elements.what: 28px r8 panel3 tile; for a RUNNING chat it holds the 18px brand <Mark> gradient svg and takes inline color:var(--jade) — otherwise Icon.chats (copilot-app.jsx:116)

elements.label: detail.chatrow.name
elements.what: 12.5px/500 var(--tx) flex row, gap 8px to the status chip (copilot.css:292)

elements.label: detail.chatrow.chip
elements.what: status pill, mono 10.5px, r999, chip--ok jade / chip--warn amber / chip--off mut2; inline padding:1px 8px OVERRIDES the css 2px 8px; contains a 6px .dotk when running

elements.label: detail.chatrow.sub
elements.what: preview line, inline font-family:var(--body) override; embeds a .mono span for the model name (copilot-app.jsx:119)

elements.label: detail.chatrow.time
elements.what: right-aligned relative time, mono 10.5px var(--mut2) (copilot.css:295)

elements.label: detail.filerow
elements.what: file row is a DIV (not a button) with inline cursor:default — deliberately NON-interactive (copilot-app.jsx:161)

elements.label: detail.filerow.name
elements.what: filename; its .lrow__sub sibling keeps the DEFAULT mono family (no inline body override, unlike chat rows) and there is no time column
